description: Definition of AWS::BedrockAgentCore::CodeInterpreter Resource Type. This is a read-only resource representing the AWS-managed default code interpreter (aws.codeinterpreter.v1).

CodeInterpreterArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the code interpreter.
CodeInterpreterArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the code interpreter.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:[a-z0-9-]+:bedrock-agentcore:[a-z0-9-]+:(aws|[0-9]{12}):code-interpreter/aws\.codeinterpreter\.v1$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CodeInterpreterId.description: The unique identifier of the code interpreter.
CodeInterpreterId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the code interpreter.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^aws\.codeinterpreter\.v1$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Status.description: The current status of the code interpreter.
Status.markdownDescription:
The current status of the code interpreter.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: CREATING | CREATE_FAILED | READY | DELETING | DELETE_FAILED | DELETED  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
